description: Merge conflict resolved at tier auto-resolve. Branch: overstory/grounding-builder/tav-d699. Agent: grounding-builder. Conflicting files: .mulch/mulch.config.yaml.

content: Multi-agent search pipeline (tav-28ea): decomposeQuery (generateObject+zod, 5s Promise.race timeout, 2-3 subtasks) → orchestrateSearch (Promise.allSettled, dedup by URL keep highest score, filter content<50, sort by score) → buildSystemPrompt (group by category ## headings, sequential [N]). Route: word count >= 3 triggers decompose. all_failed → 502, ok+0 results → proceed. Source title prefix: [category] Title.
